app.title: Full Stack Project
app.description: Modern base with Angular, Tailwind, Vitest, Testing Library, Playwright, and Storybook.

auth.title: Explore MesaFlow
auth.description: Manage tables, orders, kitchen, and payments from an experience designed for restaurants.

benefits.kitchen: Kitchen and preparation in real time
benefits.menu: Menu, set menus, and combo platters

demo.title: Quick demo
demo.description: Choose a profile to explore MesaFlow without entering credentials.
demo.restaurantDescription: Open service, floor, and kitchen flows in one click.

credentials.title: Product sign-in
credentials.description: Use your account credentials to continue where you left off.

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long.

manager.label: Manager
manager.description: Shifts, discounts, menu, and cash desk.

errors.invalidCredentials: Sign-in failed. Check your email and password.
errors.demoUnavailable: The demo could not be opened right now. Try again in a few minutes.

warmingUp.title: We are waking up the database
warmingUp.description: The first access can take a few seconds. We keep retrying in the background so you can sign in as soon as everything responds.

down.title: The services are not responding right now
down.description: The app keeps trying to recover the connection. If it persists, review the database status and try again.

seed.label: Load demo data
seed.error: Could not load the data. Please try again.

developer.title: Developer resources
developer.description: Technical documentation available only to accounts with the Developer role.

warming_up.title: Database waking up
warming_up.description: The first access can take a few seconds while the infrastructure starts responding again.

down.title: Services degraded
down.description: The platform is still trying to recover the database connection.

developer.storybook: Explore components, states, and visual patterns.
developer.architecture: Review the main frontend decisions and flows.

tables.cardDescription: Review core entities, base fields, and relationships across domains.
tables.title: Table map
tables.description: Quick view for reviewing the main product entities before wiring an automatic source of truth.

filters.title: Filters
filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by table, field, or relation

map.title: Primary relationships
map.description: Visual summary of the most relevant tables and how they connect.

diagram.title: Mermaid diagram
diagram.description: Rendered view and source for the current graph based on active filters.
diagram.interactionHint: Click a table in the diagram to open its detail.
diagram.fullscreenDescription: Expanded view of the current diagram to inspect relationships and navigate across tables.
diagram.renderHint: The source is always available. Render the SVG only when you need it.
diagram.sourceDescription: Mermaid code generated from the visible tables with the active filters.
diagram.emptyDescription: Adjust or clear the filters to generate the graph again.
diagram.renderError: The Mermaid diagram could not be rendered. You can still inspect the generated source.

summary.title: Entity inventory
summary.description: Select a table to inspect its most important fields and references.
summary.emptyFilteredDescription: No tables match the current filters.
summary.emptyDescription: There are no documented entities yet.

detail.title: Entity detail
detail.searchPlaceholder: Search by field, type, or reference
detail.emptyDescription: This table does not have documented fields yet.
detail.emptySearchDescription: No fields match the current search.
detail.noRelations: There are no documented relationships for this table.
detail.noSelection: Select a table from the inventory or the diagram to review its details.
detail.noSelectionFiltered: There are no visible tables for the current filters.

logs.cardDescription: Review operational health, recent errors, and audited activity.
logs.title: Operational logs
logs.description: Monitor requests, errors, and audit activity from a simple technical view.

filters.title: Filters
filters.actorUserIdHint: Only users with audited activity show up.
filters.entityIdHint: Pick an entity type first to see options.

insights.auditActivityFallback: Audit activity in the current range
insights.auditRiskFallback: There is no dominant risky pattern in the visible set

table.emptyDescription: There are no events for this range yet.

userAdmin.title: User accounts
userAdmin.description: Review account types and control which users may sign in.
userAdmin.confirmRevocation: This change may close the user's active sessions.

demoRestriction.title: Account type changes are disabled
demoRestriction.description: Demo accounts cannot change other users' account type.

userAdmin.scopeSaved: The access has been updated successfully.

languageSelect.label: Language
languageSelect.hint: The preference applies to the interface.

access.title: No modules available
access.description: Your user does not have permission to access the operational POS sections.

errors.cannotResizeGrid: Cannot resize the layout because some elements would be outside the grid.
errors.addLineFailed: Could not add the product. Check the table status.
errors.sendToKitchenFailed: Could not send the order to the kitchen. Try again.
errors.updateLineFailed: Could not update the order line. The order has been reloaded.
errors.chargeFailed: The charge could not be completed. Check the table status and try again.
errors.servicePointActionFailed: The table action could not be completed. Try again.
errors.loadFailed: Could not load the restaurant data. Check your session and connection.

layout.title: Restaurant layout
layout.description: Design your dining room, bar, kitchen, and service areas.

resizeDialog.title: Resize layout
resizeDialog.description: Choose the dining room grid size before applying it.

resizeElementDialog.title: Resize element
resizeElementDialog.description: Change how many grid cells this element occupies.

elementDialog.description: Choose a preset and place it inside the current grid.
elementDialog.label: Element label
elementDialog.positionDescription: Select the upper-left corner of the element.
elementDialog.invalidPosition: The selected position is not available. Choose another free cell inside the grid.

service.title: Dining room service
service.description: This route will handle table status, orders, kitchen flow, and payments in later iterations.
service.floorDescription: Select a table to work with its service, dishes, and payment.
service.noTableDescription: Select a table to get started.
service.nextActionAddOrder: Next: add products to the order
service.searchServicePointDescription: Find a table or stool and bring it into view on the service floor.
service.searchServicePointPlaceholder: Search table, stool, status, or capacity
service.addProductsDescription: Search, filter, and add products to the order.
service.searchProductDescription: Search by name, category, or allergens and add products to the order.
service.noServicePointResults: No tables or stools match the search.
service.sendKitchenActionLabel: Send the selected table order to the kitchen
service.markServedActionLabel: Mark the selected table order as served
service.removeNonPendingConfirmDescription: {{name}} is no longer pending. If you continue, it will be cancelled in the order instead of being removed directly.
service.chargeKitchenConfirmDescription: There are {{count}} items pending for the kitchen. If you continue, they will be sent directly to the kitchen and then payment will continue.
service.setCashPaymentActionLabel: Select cash payment for the selected table
service.setCardPaymentActionLabel: Select card payment for the selected table
service.cleaningActionLabel: Mark the selected table for cleaning
service.freeTableConfirmDescription: This action will clear the order and leave the table free.

reservations.title: Reservations agenda
reservations.description: Review the day's reservations and organize them by service before opening the dining room.
reservations.lunchDescription: Reservations expected for the midday service.
reservations.dinnerDescription: Reservations expected for the evening service.
reservations.loadError: Reservations could not be loaded. Check your connection and try again.
reservations.confirmCancelDescription: The reservation will be cancelled and cannot be undone.
reservations.confirmNoShowDescription: The customer will be marked as not shown up.
reservations.emptyDayDescription: There are no reservations recorded for the selected date.
reservations.actionError: The reservation could not be updated.

confirm.title: Reservation confirmed
confirm.description: The reservation has been moved to confirmed.

seat.title: Guest seated
seat.description: The reservation has been moved to seated.

no_show.title: No-show recorded
no_show.description: The reservation has been marked as no-show.

cancel.title: Reservation cancelled
cancel.description: The reservation has been cancelled successfully.

create.title: Create reservation
create.customerHelp: Search for an existing customer or enter a new name.
create.timeHelp: Start with a recommended time for this service.
create.tableHelp: Select a suggested table or continue without assigning one.

cta.optionalTable: Select a table or continue unassigned

create.error: The reservation could not be created.
create.capacityHint: Total capacity of selected tables: {{count}} seats.

capacityWarning.description: You indicated {{partySize}} guests but the selected tables have a capacity of {{capacity}}. You can continue anyway or review your selection.

serviceWindowsDialog.title: Service windows
serviceWindowsDialog.errorAtLeastOne: At least one service window is required.

kitchen.title: Kitchen
kitchen.queueDescription: Review dishes sent from the dining room and mark each line when it is ready.
kitchen.emptyDescription: When service sends an order to the kitchen, it will appear here for preparation.
kitchen.moveBackActionLabel: Move {{name}} back to the previous phase

preparationBoard.title: Preparation
preparationBoard.description: Move lines between pending, preparing, and ready.
preparationBoard.genericMoveError: The line could not be moved.
preparationBoard.servedModalDescription: Review served lines. You can cancel one if it was served by mistake.
preparationBoard.cancelLineConfirm: Cancel this line? This action cannot be undone.

paymentGateway.description: Simulated card payment for the terminal.
paymentGateway.rejected: Payment rejected. Check the terminal or try another method.

selector.description: Choose the restaurant you want to work in.

errors.load: The time entries could not be loaded right now.

clockCard.title: Current shift

history.title: Personal history
history.description: Review recorded hours and request corrections when needed.

team.description: Review the active restaurant entries and filter by period, worker, or status.

requests.description: Approve or reject time changes sent by the team.

dashboard.title: Restaurant analytics
dashboard.description: Check the restaurant's historical performance: sales, products, and occupancy.

filters.rangeClamped: The maximum range is 1 year; the date has been adjusted.

page.title: Menu
page.description: Review products, availability, categories, and modifiers before service.
page.searchPlaceholder: Search product, category, allergen, or modifier
page.allergenFilterHint: Show products that declare one or more of the selected allergens.
page.reorderModeHint: Filter by a category to reorder its products.
page.reorderFailed: The order could not be saved.
page.previewReorderHint: Drag sections (by their handle) or dishes to reorder them: the order is saved and is what customers will see on their phone.
page.duplicateFailed: The product could not be duplicated.
page.batchFailed: Not all changes could be applied.
page.loadFailed: The menu could not be loaded. The server may be starting up; try again.

reviewFilters.title: Manual filters
reviewFilters.description: Combine these with the detected issues above to narrow down the product list.

filtersSummary.title: Active filters
filtersSummary.empty: There are no active filters yet. Use these controls to narrow the list faster.

basics.title: Basics
basics.description: Start with category, availability and product type.

view.title: View
view.description: Choose how you want to scan the list while editing.

page.deleteModifierGroupDescription: The group "{{ name }}" and all its options will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
page.comboGuideDescription: Check at a glance which menus have imagery, how many slots they require, and which ones are still customizable.
page.noSelection: Select a product to review its details.
page.availabilityManagementDescription: Enable or disable products for today's service.
page.deleteSectionConfirm: Delete section "{{name}}"? Its items will also be removed.
page.deleteProductDescription: Delete «{{name}}»? This action cannot be undone.

audit.title: Quick menu review
audit.description: Use these alerts to spot which products still need imagery, copy, or operational review.
audit.empty: There are no open catalog alerts.

customizer.title: Customize product
customizer.description: Select modifiers and add a kitchen note when needed.
customizer.kitchenNotePlaceholder: Example: no salt, little done, sauce aside...

comboCustomizer.title: Configure menu
comboCustomizer.noValidProducts: No products are available for this slot.
comboCustomizer.invalidSelection: Complete the required slots to add the menu.

form.name: Main name
form.nameHint: Internal use: kitchen, POS, and admin search. Can be long or descriptive.
form.nameI18nHint: What the diner sees in the app for their language. Leave blank to use the main name.
form.descriptionI18nHint: What the diner sees in the app for their language. Leave blank to use the main description.
form.dropImageHint: Drag an image here or open the picker
form.invalidImageType: Use a JPG, PNG, or WEBP image.
form.imageTooLarge: The image is too large. Try a lighter file.
form.imageTooSmall: The image is too small. Use a higher resolution image.
form.uploadFailed: The image could not be uploaded. Please try again.
form.modifierGroupsHint: Select the modifier groups that this product can use.
form.supplementsHint: Priced extras specific to this product (e.g. "add bacon +1.50€"). Not shared with other products.
form.noSupplements: This product has no supplements of its own.
form.classificationHint: Define where and how this product is handled.
form.salesHint: Set the price and tax setup.
form.previewNoSectionHint: This product isn't in any menu section yet.
form.previewNewProductHint: Add the product to a section from the menu to see it here in context.
form.allergensHint: Select the allergens this product declares. For a severe allergy, the customer should also confirm with staff.

combo.title: Combo slots
combo.hint: Each slot defines which products the customer can pick and any priced supplement.
combo.noSlots: This combo has no slots yet.

platter.title: Platter components
platter.hint: The ingredients that can be removed or swapped when assembling the platter.
platter.noComponents: This platter has no components yet.

form.categoryRequiredHint: Pick a category so the product shows up in the menu.

modifierOverrides.title: Modifier prices for this product
modifierOverrides.hint: Adjust a modifier price just for this product. If you leave it as is, the group default price is used.
modifierOverrides.empty: This product has no modifier groups assigned.
